data: Looking to sell encrypted files. MD5: e99a18c428cb38d5f260853678922e03 password protected. SHA256: c5f414b38eeff690b7cc2b5e42875048c9dbf370d34b8a45b6f3d3d648c23f22 is the main archive. Contact CryptoKing77 for details.

Forum post: New malware sample uploaded. File hash: 275a021bbfb6489e54d471899f7db9d1663fc695ec2fe2a2c4538aabf651fd0f (SHA256). Also available: SHA1 version 356a192b7913b04c54574d18c28d46e6395428ab. Testing on Windows 10/11.

Threat Intel Report: APT group using custom RAT. IOCs include file hashes MD5 d41d8cd98f00b204e9800998ecf8427e and SHA256 e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855. Infrastructure C2 server identified.
Extracted from paste site: Ransomware deployment script. Related files with hashes: abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890 (MD5) and SHA1: fedcba0987654321fedcba0987654321fedcba09. Avoid execution.
No hash patterns detected in this sample. Regular text about cryptocurrency exchanges and wallet addresses. Bitcoin: 1A1zP1eP5QGefi2DMPTfTL5SLmv7DivfNa but no file hashes present.
